behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names all three file paths and the function HandleCurrentExceptionWhenLeavingKotlinCode and the RUNTIME_NORETURN macro that tests check.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem and says to use RUNTIME_NORETURN consistently, but doesn't specify exact placement (before/after function name) or exact edits.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_all_three_locations_consistent and test_exceptions_cpp_has_noreturn require 'void RUNTIME_NORETURN HandleCurrentExceptionWhenLeavingKotlinCode' (macro before name) for .h/.cpp, but 'RUNTIME_NORETURN void ...' (before void) is equally correct C++ and would fail; similarly kt_has requires RUNTIME_NORETURN after the parens, rejecting valid alternatives.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke clang to dump AST and compile code, verifying actual noreturn attribute behavior, not just text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require the noreturn attribute to actually appear in Clang AST and the compile to not warn; a stub wouldn't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three files and the suppression of -Wreturn-type warnings as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have docstrings and are separated with section comment headers like 'FAIL-TO-PASS TESTS - Behavioral'.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code-only, no structured data produced.

no_typos.reason: Paths and function names are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the three files but localization is explicitly part of the task setup; no exact line/edit given.
